allow: Bash(curl -s -L -A "Mozilla/5.0 \(Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64\) AppleWebKit/537.36 \(KHTML, like Gecko\) Chrome/120.0.0.0 Safari/537.36" "https://www.cartier.com/ko-kr/%EC%A0%9C%EC%95%88/%EC%A0%9C%ED%92%88-%EC%9D%B8%EA%B7%B8%EB%A0%88%EC%9D%B4%EB%B9%99/love-%EB%B8%8C%EB%A0%88%EC%9D%B4%EC%8A%AC%EB%A6%BF-%ED%81%B4%EB%9E%98%EC%8B%9D-%EB%AA%A8%EB%8D%B8-CRB6067517.html" -o /tmp/cartier_page.html)
